content: PowerWorld Kiribathgoda operates daily with early-morning and evening peak usage. Members should complete check-in/check-out through QR or assisted trainer flow.
Only members with active or grace-period subscriptions can enter through member check-in. Staff roles (trainer, manager, admin) can enter without subscription validation.

Beginner fat-loss starter: 3 days/week, 35-45 minutes/session. Include treadmill incline walk 15 min, bodyweight squats 3x12, assisted rows 3x12, light dumbbell press 3x10, plank 3x30s, cooldown 8 min.

Beginner muscle-gain starter: 4 days/week split. Day A: goblet squat, bench press machine, seated row, shoulder press, core. Day B: leg press, lat pulldown, chest fly, RDL variation, core. Progressively increase load.
Members can book personal sessions from the app. Trainers should confirm and track session outcomes. If members request help on floor, prioritize safety/form correction before intensity.
Always prioritize safety and proper form. Stop exercise if sharp pain, dizziness, or chest discomfort occurs. For diagnosis or medical concerns, direct users to licensed healthcare professionals.
